creator: nick.hibma@jrc.it
text:
A patch:

--- Makefile.orig       Fri Jun 25 12:59:16 1999
+++ Makefile    Fri Jun 25 13:05:01 1999
@@ -53,4 +53,10 @@
                @ /usr/bin/more -e ${FILESDIR}/post-install-notes
 .endif
 
-.include <bsd.port.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+.if !exists(${DISTDIR}/${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX}) || 1
+IGNORE='Please fetch the distribution ${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX} first
from http://www.Hughes.com.au and put the file in ${DISTDIR}. The
distribution requires registration prior to use'
+.endif
+
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Idea-By: "Scot W. Hetzel" <hetzels@westbend.net>
